title: Brass Age
description:
A steampunk style resource pack.
Although not specifically designed for create mod, this resource pack also supports create mod well.
body:
A steampunk style resource pack( Currently, only GUI has been modified ).
Although not specifically designed for create mod, this resource pack also supports create mod well.
![1.21 crafter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aadba09df4a8f3befc71be1e9464b054cf6ed307.png)
*This is a highly stylized resource pack, it may cause confusion for players unfamiliar with vanilla Minecraft. So it is more suitable for pro players.

You can use this in your modpacks.
